name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: In Tampa, FL at 11616 N 22nd St, 5 Star Car Title Loans offers quick car title loans with flexible terms and fast approval.
description_long:
The 5 Star Car Title Loans location on North 22nd Street in Tampa serves the local community with car title loan services. This standalone storefront at 11616 N 22nd St is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday 10AM to 5PM. Customers in Tampa can stop by to discuss title-based loans without an appointment.

At this Tampa, FL location, the team helps borrowers secure fast cash against their vehicle titles. They offer flexible loan terms, transparent pricing, and quick approval processes. For questions about rates, eligibility, or to apply, call +1 813-592-1814.

If you're a Tampa resident needing quick cash, bring your vehicle title, a valid ID, and proof of residency. The process is straightforward and designed for locals who need fast access to funds. 5 Star Car Title Loans focuses on providing transparent, fair lending.
pros: Same-day funding available for qualified applicants upon approval
Loan amounts up to $50,000, significantly higher than typical payday loans
No prepayment penalties—borrowers can pay off loans early without fees
Transparent terms and no hidden fees explicitly stated on website
Accepts applicants with imperfect credit; credit check not required
Borrowers keep their vehicle while using its title as collateral
Nationwide presence across nearly 18 states with physical locations
Licensed and regulated lender with 255K+ loans funded since 2012
Accepts alternative collateral (motorcycles, semi-trucks, not just cars)
cons: No APR or interest rates disclosed on website, typical of predatory title loan products; rates likely 100-300% APR
Vehicle title held as collateral—default could result in repossession and loss of transportation
Loan terms and availability vary significantly by state; federal and state regulations may limit options
Customer reviews are limited (11 reviews cited) and presented on company website, creating potential bias
Quick approval and same-day funding may encourage impulsive borrowing without full cost assessment
best_for: Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs ($500-$5,000) who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Borrowers who need emergency funds for urgent expenses and have vehicle equity
Individuals with poor or limited credit history seeking secured lending options
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is appropriate for vehicle owners facing genuine financial emergencies who have exhausted other borrowing options and fully understand the risks. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost, high-risk debt products with undisclosed interest rates; borrowers should only use this option if they are confident in their ability to repay and understand that vehicle loss is a real consequence of default.
services: Vehicle title loans up to $50,000 with flexible repayment terms
Motorcycle title loans using motorcycle equity as collateral
Semi-truck title loans for commercial vehicle owners
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments up to 24 months
Same-day loans for urgent expenses (rent, bills, car repairs)
Online application process with quick approval (decisions within minutes)
In-person application at physical locations across 18 states
Same-day cash pickup option for approved applicants
Free pre-qualification quotes before committing to application
Secure application with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 11616 N 22nd St, Tampa, FL. Quick car title loans with flexible terms and fast approval.
